description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, blued steel barrel with a ventilated rib running along the top for improved aiming. The stock and fore-end are made of polished wood, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. A single red shotgun shell is positioned below the receiver, indicating the type of ammunition used. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long, vented barrel, wooden stock and fore-end, and a single red shell beneath the receiver. The design is classic and robust, with a matte metallic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, wooden stock and fore-end, metallic barrel with vent rib, and a red shell below the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the alignment of the wooden fore-end, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the wooden stock, fore-end, metallic barrel, and the red shell beneath the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the shotgun's length compressed into a narrow profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a ventilated rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
